prompt: Turn the confirmed session summary in evals/files/personal-docs-to-sop.md into a reusable skill. This is a benchmark run with no live user, so treat the file contents as already-confirmed answers and do not ask follow-up questions. Save the generated skill to outputs/SKILL.md and write outputs/output.md describing the recommended save path, invocation command, and any assumptions.
assertions: Frontmatter includes arguments and argument-hint for the confirmed inputs
Frontmatter includes a when_to_use trigger description tailored to doc-to-sop requests
Every major step includes explicit success criteria
allowed-tools stays within document-oriented tools and does not add Bash
The workflow explicitly avoids inventing shell commands or package installation steps unless the source requires them
